title: Spicy Ethiopian Stew
description: A flavorful and spicy stew originating from Ethiopia, made with the addition of peanuts for a crunchy element. This stew is hearty and filling, making it perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the onion, garlic, and red pepper and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add the Berbere spice mix and cook for 1 minute.
Add the tomato paste and cook for another minute.
Add the crushed tomatoes, vegetable broth, and peanuts. Bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Season the stew with salt to taste.
Serve hot over rice or with injera bread.
